title: event.openingHours
description: A list of multiple open/closed times and weekdays indicating when the event is happening when using the `periodic` calendarType. Each item can optionally specify childcare availability times.

opens.description: Opening time on the related weekdays, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation).

closes.description: Closing time on the related weekdays, in H:MM or HH:MM format (24-hour notation).
